subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Ḥusayn! Praise be to God Who hath caused thee to hear His most sweet call and guided thee unto His most glorious Path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الحسین الحمد لله الذی اسمعک ندائه الاحلی و هدیک الی صراطه الابهی و
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation
